highlights.title: IPOs, Huawei Plan Add to China’s $900 Billion Chip Stock Boom
highlights.description: The rally in China’s semiconductor stocks is poised to extend thanks to upcoming blockbuster IPOs and technology breakthroughs, investors and analysts say.

highlights.title: Warren invites Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to Senate hearing on China AI chip sales
highlights.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is pressing Jensen Huang's Nvidia over export controls, China sales, Trump and data-center policy as Congress scrutinizes the AI chip boom.

highlights.title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
highlights.description: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.

highlights.title: Tracking website, food watch: South Korea is obsessing over Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's visit
highlights.description: South Korean investors are eagerly tracking Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's every move as they wait to see what the AI megacap company will do next.

highlights.title: Nvidia Clears ‘Big Three’ for Vera Rubin HBM4 Supply
highlights.description: Nvidia Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang confirmed that the company has certified the three biggest memory chipmakers to supply their most advanced high-bandwidth products for the US company’s AI accelerators. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

highlights.title: Anthropic Calls for AI Pause Button to Let Humans Take Stock
highlights.description: Anthropic PBC called for the creation of an industrywide mechanism to pause the development of artificial intelligence, giving society the opportunity to “deal with its immense implications.”

highlights.title: SpaceX Boosts Japan Fundraising Goal to $2.5 Billion in Mega IPO
highlights.description: SpaceX has increased the amount it’s planning to raise from the Japanese portion of its share sale by a quarter, indicating strong demand among the country’s retail investors.

highlights.title: Broadcom Is Eschewing Acquisitions in Favor of AI Organic Growth
highlights.description: Broadcom Inc. Chief Executive Officer Hock Tan, who created the chip behemoth using a series of acquisitions, said the company is now less focused on dealmaking because AI offers stronger growth potential.

highlights.title: Nvidia Clears Memory’s Big Three for Vera Rubin HBM4 Supply
highlights.description: Nvidia Corp. has certified the three biggest memory chipmakers to supply their most advanced high-bandwidth products for the US company’s AI accelerators, Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang confirmed for the first time.

highlights.title: XBOX CEO Sharma Shares Vision for Reboot
highlights.description: Asha Sharma, CEO at XBOX discusses platform strategy, gaming innovation and the importance of the console with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

business.title: IPOs, Huawei Plan Add to China’s $900 Billion Chip Stock Boom
business.description: The rally in China’s semiconductor stocks is poised to extend thanks to upcoming blockbuster IPOs and technology breakthroughs, investors and analysts say.

business.title: SpaceX Boosts Japan Fundraising Goal to $2.5 Billion in Mega IPO
business.description: SpaceX has increased the amount it’s planning to raise from the Japanese portion of its share sale by a quarter, indicating strong demand among the country’s retail investors.

business.title: Broadcom Is Eschewing Acquisitions in Favor of AI Organic Growth
business.description: Broadcom Inc. Chief Executive Officer Hock Tan, who created the chip behemoth using a series of acquisitions, said the company is now less focused on dealmaking because AI offers stronger growth potential.

business.title: Apex Space Doubles Valuation to $2.3 Billion in Funding Round
business.description: Startup Apex Space announced that it had raised more than $200 million as it works to increase production of satellite platforms for commercial firms and government work, including the development of President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome missile defense shield.

business.title: Satellite maker Apex’s valuation rises to $2.3 billion after latest $200 million raise
business.description:
Apex has raised more than $200 million to expand in-house satellite production capabilities, announcing a funding round June 5 it says nearly doubled the four-year-old manufacturer’s valuation to $2.3 billion.
The post Satellite maker Apex’s valuation rises to $2.3 billion after latest $200 million raise appeared first on SpaceNews.

ai.title: What to Expect From Apple’s AI, Siri and iOS 27 Launch at WWDC 2026
ai.description: The iPhone maker will attempt its artificial intelligence turnaround on Monday.

ai.title: Meta AI Chief Sees Opportunity in Models’ Giving Health Advice
ai.description: Meta Platforms Inc. Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang said the company’s future artificial intelligence models will differentiate themselves from competitors through their consumer health capabilities.

ai.title: Anthropic proposes a global slowdown of AI development
ai.description: Anthropic warns that AIs will soon be able to build their own successor, and it's suggesting that companies may have to slow down development.

ai.title: Why Apple Might Put Cameras Into Its Next AirPods
ai.description: From battery life to privacy, there are many hurdles to the idea taking off.

ai.title: Market Consolidation 'Healthy,' Goldman Says
ai.description: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, Head of Asset Allocation Research at Goldman Sachs, discusses market sentiment as enthusiasm for the artificial intelligence trade cools. "It's probably not a bad idea to see a bit of a consolidation," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

ai.title: K2 AM's Boubouras on Markets, Investment Strategy
ai.description: George Boubouras, Managing Director of Research, Investments and Advisory at K2 Asset Management, discusses his outlook for markets and investment strategy. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

ai.title: China Stock-Yuan Correlation Hits Three-Year High on Optimism
ai.description: Chinese stocks and the yuan are moving increasingly in tandem as sentiment toward the country’s assets improves, driven by enthusiasm over artificial intelligence and investors’ push for diversification.

ai.title: Tesla erases the past, CAT electrifies the future, and EV tech training TODAY
ai.description:
On today’s time-traveling episode of Quick Charge, Tesla might be trying to erase evidence of FSD fraud, Caterpillar keeps trying to electrify the construction space, and time is rapidly running out on what’s left of the 30% home solar tax credit.
more…

ai.title: Hon Hai Sales Growth Accelerates Beyond Estimates in May
ai.description: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co.’s revenue rose 34% in the April to May period, underscoring demand for the Nvidia Corp. servers essential to AI infrastructure.

chips_cloud.title: Nvidia Clears ‘Big Three’ for Vera Rubin HBM4 Supply
chips_cloud.description: Nvidia Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang confirmed that the company has certified the three biggest memory chipmakers to supply their most advanced high-bandwidth products for the US company’s AI accelerators. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

chips_cloud.title: XBOX CEO Sharma Shares Vision for Reboot
chips_cloud.description: Asha Sharma, CEO at XBOX discusses platform strategy, gaming innovation and the importance of the console with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

chips_cloud.title: Trump Officials Worry US Loophole Let Chinese Firms Buy Nvidia Blackwell Chips
chips_cloud.description: Trump officials have spent the past week embroiled in a remarkable argument — over what, exactly, their China tech policy has been for the past year.

chips_cloud.title: US Firm to Build $6.2 Billion Lesotho Hydro Project, Data Center
chips_cloud.description: Convalt Energy, a US-based company, agreed to spend $6.2 billion to build a 1,200-megawatt hydro-power project and an artificial intelligence data center in Lesotho.

chips_cloud.title: Blackstone’s AirTrunk to Spend $30 Billion on India Data Centers
chips_cloud.description: AirTrunk, a data center operator backed by Blackstone Inc., plans to invest about $30 billion in India over the next few years to tap the country’s rapidly expanding AI and cloud markets.

space.title: Musk Leaves Investors Starstruck at Dimon’s SpaceX Extravaganza
space.description: Elon Musk can still enchant investors with his vision of the future.

space.title: Founders Fund launches game show starring Sam Altman, Palmer Luckey, and other tech elites
space.description: The debut episode, moderated by Founders Fund chief marketing officer Mike Solana, included a star-studded cast of current tech luminaries.

crypto.title: Bitcoin in danger of dropping to $60,000, with Zcash bulls turning their backs on ZEC
crypto.description: AI bets are recording rapid profit-taking as Broadcom as outlook for AI-chip sales fell short of high expectations, driving down crypto markets.

crypto.title: Bitcoin plunges to near $62,000 as the AI trade unwinds, HYPE falls 14%
crypto.description: Broadcom's disappointing AI chip outlook pulled the Nasdaq lower for a third session, dragged Asian equities down with it, and took crypto along for the ride.

ev_autonomous.title: China Speeds Past Japan in Australian Car Imports on EV Bonanza
ev_autonomous.description: China has surged past Japan to become the biggest car supplier to Australia, with imports from companies such as BYD Co. accelerating to a record high, powered by demand for electric vehicles.
